title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
summary_full: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.
summary_public: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal
